review_scope: Read-only comparison of the ten live-only version identities with same-name repository migrations on synchronized main.

pairs.name: create_admin_audit_log_flags_v1
pairs.recommended_disposition: Preserve both identities. Do not rewrite the live ledger. Compare live and isolated table, constraint, index, RLS, grant, and function effects before proposing a forward-only correction.

pairs.name: issue_contract_rewards_atomic_v1
pairs.recommended_disposition: Preserve both identities. Verify function signature, security-definer properties, grants, idempotency constraints, and reward issuance behavior in isolation before any forward-only correction.

pairs.name: harden_admin_data_api_tables_v1
pairs.recommended_disposition: Treat as the same migration content under different version identities. Preserve both historical records and verify isolated replay ordering; do not reapply to production solely to align the version number.

pairs.name: complete_admin_control_surfaces_v1
pairs.recommended_disposition: Treat as the same migration content under different version identities. Preserve both historical records and verify isolated replay ordering; do not reapply to production solely to align the version number.

pairs.name: harden_security_definer_rpc_privileges_v1
pairs.recommended_disposition: Preserve both identities. Compare function ownership, SECURITY DEFINER state, search paths, PUBLIC/anon/authenticated revocations, and service-role grants before proposing a forward-only privilege correction.

pairs.name: index_admin_control_surface_foreign_keys_v1
pairs.recommended_disposition: Preserve both identities. Compare exact index definitions, predicates, uniqueness, and covered foreign-key columns in live and isolated snapshots.

pairs.name: add_configurable_player_identity_v1
pairs.recommended_disposition: Preserve both identities. Compare player columns, constraints, indexes, credential function definitions, grants, and data backfill behavior in isolation.

pairs.name: harden_configurable_player_identity_rpc_grants_v1
pairs.recommended_disposition: Preserve both identities. Compare exact EXECUTE privileges and PUBLIC/anon/authenticated revocations before a forward-only grant correction is considered.

pairs.name: fix_player_identity_rpc_column_ambiguity_v1
pairs.recommended_disposition: Preserve both identities. Compare the effective function definition and execute regression probes against live-exported and isolated definitions.

pairs.name: add_story_notification_tables_v1
pairs.recommended_disposition: Preserve both identities. Compare notification tables, delivery constraints, indexes, RLS state, grants, and later hardening migration effects before proposing a forward-only correction.

global_disposition: The ten live-only identities are reviewed and paired by exact migration name. Two pairs are byte-identical at the stored-statement/repository-file SHA-256 boundary. Eight pairs have content drift and remain blocking until isolated schema-effect comparison. No production ledger rewrite or speculative corrective migration is authorized.
